examples.title: Classroom Location
examples.content: Your desk is 3 meters from the left wall and 5 meters from the front wall. That's (3, 5). Cartesian: simple and intuitive.

examples.title: Moving Object
examples.content: A ball at time t=0 is at (0, 0). At t=1s it's at (2, 3). At t=2s it's at (4, 6). Track motion in Cartesian: straightforward.

examples.title: 3D Room Position
examples.content: A lamp hangs 2m from the left wall, 3m from the front wall, and 2m above the floor. Position: (2, 3, 2). Cartesian in 3D.
